heading: Acknowledge Alerts
body:
**Org:**

Organization Alerts

To acknowledge alerts:

> **Important:** If an alert uses PagerDuty for alert notifications, you can
> acknowledge the alert only on your PagerDuty dashboard.

**Project:**

Project Alerts

**Atlascli:**

Atlas CLI

To acknowledge one alert for the specified project using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas alerts acknowledge <alertId> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas alerts acknowledge](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-alerts-acknowledge).

**Ui:**

Atlas UI

To acknowledge alerts using the Atlas UI:

> **Important:** If an alert uses PagerDuty for alert notifications, you can
> acknowledge the alert only on your PagerDuty dashboard.

When you acknowledge an alert, Atlas sends no further notifications
until either the acknowledgement period ends, you resolve the alert
condition, or you unacknowledge the alert. If an alert condition ends
during an acknowledgment period, Atlas sends a notification.
